quests.name: The Sleepless Sentinels
quests.description: Beyond Teganswall lies the Eternal Watch — where the dead never rest.
dialogueStart: The seals bore the mark of the Eternal Watch — a place I hoped was only legend.
Its sentinels guard a rift between life and death. Thin them, and I'll find the source.
dialogueCompletion: The rift... it's real. And it's tearing wider.
Souls are pouring through. Someone must hold it while I work.

quests.name: The Rift of Souls
quests.description: Hold your ground at the rift while Amuun's ritual takes hold.

objectives.description: Survive 40 seconds at the Rift of Souls (stay inside)

dialogueStart: Stand within the rift's circle. Do not leave it — the ritual anchors to your presence.
The dead will come without end for forty heartbeats. Endure.
dialogueCompletion: The rift is anchored. You held longer than any watchman ever did.
One spirit broke free in the chaos — bound, confused. Lead it out before it's lost.

quests.name: The Bound Spirit
quests.description: Escort the bound spirit out of the Watch before the rift reclaims it.

objectives.description: Escort the Bound Spirit to the gate (keep enemies away)

dialogueStart: The spirit remembers something — a name, a place. It must reach the living world.
Guide it to the eastern gate. If the sentinels swarm it, it unravels.
dialogueCompletion: It's free. And what it whispered... a temple, to the south. Gorgons guard it.
Rest, {player}. The road only darkens from here.
